title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 21 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/03/2025
Today, the most-traded iron ore futures contract moved downwards after a higher opening and fluctuated downward throughout the day.The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 757.5, down 0.33% for the day. Traders' willingness to sell was average; with the weekend approaching, steel mills inquired less, and some purchased as needed; the market transaction atmosphere was quiet. In Shandong, the mainstream transaction prices of PB fines were around 760 yuan/mt, down 5 yuan/mt from yesterday; in Tangshan, the transaction prices of PB fines were around 770 yuan/mt, down 2-5 yuan/mt from yesterday.
